description: Crafted from genuine leather, this wallet from lee is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. lee has perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes by combining classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 12 cm x 9.5 cmTwo main compartments with embossed branding on the frontTextured upperTwo slip pockets for coins on the left sideA buttoned pocket on the right sideLeather overlay riveted to the spine of the wallet for styleCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
